headline: Is Block (XYZ) Below Fair Value As Index Removal Sparks A Valuation Reset?
summary: Block (XYZ) has come under fresh attention after being dropped from several Russell growth benchmarks. This has prompted investors to reassess what index removal, recent client wins, and ongoing AI initiatives might mean for the stock. See our latest analysis for Block. At a share price of US$77.56, Block has seen a 30 day share price return of 13.81% and a 90 day share price return of 23.44%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 14.33% contrasts with a 5 year total shareholder return that...
